# Vibe Storefront

Vibe Storefront is a Next.js prototype that turns plain-English product ideas into shareable storefront concepts.

Public entry points:

- https://vibe-storefront.com/
- https://vibe-storefront.com/storefronts
- https://vibe-storefront.com/s/{slug}

Generated storefront pages are concept pages for market validation. They should not be interpreted as real product listings, real inventory, customer reviews, or purchase-ready commerce pages.

Private and non-index targets:

- /dashboard
- /sign-in
- /api/*
